nasb.text: So Gideon said to Him, “If now I have found favor in Your sight, then show me a sign that it is You who speak with me.

esv.text: And he said to him, “If now I have found favor in your eyes, then show me a sign that it is you who speak with me.

cnv.text: 基甸又對他說：“如果我在你眼前蒙恩，求你給我一個憑據，證實是你與我說話。

ccb.text: 基甸说：“如果我在你面前蒙恩，求你给我一个凭据，使我知道与我说话的真是你耶和华。
